title: Ball and Chain suppresses positive SPD modifiers

card.rawText: SPD: -6. Negate other SPD increases to the equipped creature.

plan.title: Ball and Chain suppresses positive SPD modifiers
plan.summary: Verify positive SPD buffs on equipped creature are ignored while Ball and Chain is equipped.

notes: Use a deterministic test SPD +4 buff card/effect on the same creature.

steps: Equip Ball and Chain to player_1 primary creature.
Apply SPD +4 modifier to the equipped creature.
Remove Ball and Chain while leaving +4 modifier active.

expectedAssertions.label: Positive SPD applies after Ball and Chain removed

manualVerification: Confirm suppression only blocks SPD increases, not SPD decreases or other stats.
riskNotes: No registered runtime route for SUPPRESS_MODIFIER_LAYER.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Action type SUPPRESS_MODIFIER_LAYER currently has no runtime route.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
